name: chisel-common-binaries
title: chisel-common-binaries
description:
Prebuilt binaries for chisel
This package contains a fast TCP/UDP tunnel, transported over HTTP, secured
via SSH. Single executable including both client and server.  Chisel is mainly
useful for passing through firewalls, though it can also be used to provide a
secure endpoint into your network.

arguments.description: Option present in package usage line for chisel-common-binaries.
arguments.raw: -common-binaries  Option present in package usage line for chisel-common-binaries.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use chisel-common-binaries because Prebuilt binaries for chisel.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use chisel-common-binaries as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `chisel-common-binaries [options] [args]` as documented upstream for chisel-common-binaries.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair chisel-common-binaries with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `chisel-common-binaries --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
